AI & Data Science engineering student with hands-on experience in Computer Vision, NLP, and Agentic AI. Built production-
oriented ML systems achieving 85%+ accuracy and 90% reduction in manual processing time. IIT Palakkad hackathon
finalist and SIH 2025 shortlistee. Proficient in Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, FastAPI, and Docker.

AI / ML & Deep Learning:Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Natural Language Processing (NLP),

Sep 2023 - Present

PROJECTS
AI-Powered Handwritten Production Plan Digitization System
Built an end-to-end OCR solution leveraging Python, OpenCV, DocTR, TrOCR, and OpenPyXL to digitize industrial
production planning forms with 85%+ field extraction accuracy.
Automated PDF-to-Excel conversion, cutting manual processing time by 90% and enabling structured data
extraction, validation, and reporting for production workflows.
Solar-Hybrid Dewatering System with AI Digital Twin (SIH 2025)
Designed a solar-hybrid mine dewatering solution using DC-coupled architecture, AI Digital Twin, and TinyML-
based predictive maintenance to ensure near-zero downtime and reduce OPEX and diesel dependency.
Enabled real-time monitoring and optimization using IoT sensors, weather data, and an OPEX (pay-per-use)
model for ESG-compliant mining.
Regulatory-Grade Market Surveillance & Manipulation Detection System
Developed a multi-layer surveillance framework using trade network analysis to detect manipulation patterns like
circular trading and pump-and-dump.
Built an explainable surveillance engine combining 20+ risk signals across trading behavior, timing patterns, and
infrastructure usage to generate entity-level risk scores and investigation insights.
Aura Vision – Object Detection & Navigation Aid for the Blind
Built an edge-based object detection system using YOLO, MobileNet-SSD, OpenCV, and TensorFlow Lite for real-
time obstacle detection achieving 88% accuracy across 15+ object classes..
Implemented low-latency audio guidance with real-time obstacle alerts, delivering inference speeds below 50 ms.
SERNOVA – AI & IoT-Driven Pregnancy Care Monitoring Platform
Built an AI and IoT-based healthcare platform analyzing 12+ maternal and fetal health metrics, achieving 91%
predictive accuracy for risk assessment and nutrition planning.
Developed an agent-based decision system and interactive dashboard to enable continuous monitoring, adaptive
care recommendations, and clinician-assisted interventions.
WORK EXPERIENCE
Python Intern - BYTS Services India Private Limited | Jun 2024 – Jul 2024
Successfully completed an internship focused on data analysis and problem-solving using Python.
Worked on real-world datasets to extract insights, improve data handling skills, and understand industry
workflows.

Smart India Hackathon 2025, Shortlisted
ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

Sports Achievement: State-level Kho-Kho Player – Represented at State Competitions

SalesOS.ai – Agentic AI Sales Intelligence & Revenue Acceleration Platform

AI Deepfake & Manipulated Content Verification System
Built a multi-modal AI system to detect deepfakes using rPPG, voice scams, and malicious links with confidence scoring.

AI-Enhanced EV Digital Twin & Predictive Analytics

AI-based Human Stampede Early Warning System
Developed a real-time AI system to analyze crowd density and movement for early stampede risk detection.
Implemented a live dashboard with automated emergency alerts to authorities.
Aarambam - Voice-First AI-Based UPI for Inclusive Finance | Shortlisted for AI by HER: Global Impact Challenge
Built a multilingual voice-first AI assistant enabling UPI transactions, form filling, and banking guidance, removing literacy
barriers.
Implemented a real-time AI scam shield that detects fraud cues and delivers instant vernacular voice warnings for secure
transactions.
IoT-Enabled Solar Powered Mine Dewatering System with Remote Monitoring | Shortlisted for SIH’25
Engineered solar-powered automated mine dewatering solution with remote control and monitoring.
Integrated predictive maintenance and digital twin to forecast failures and improve operational reliability.
